title: Change evaluation completion contract so feedback-backed runs are not complete until RCA is persisted
description:
## Summary
Change the evaluation completion contract so feedback-backed runs are not considered successfully complete until RCA is persisted.

## Deliverables
- `COMPLETED` means metrics and RCA are both present when RCA is enabled.
- If incorrect items exist and RCA cannot be persisted, the run is not considered successful.
- Completion semantics align with RCA as required process output.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing completion semantics update in evaluation flows and tool-facing behavior so COMPLETED requires usable RCA payload when RCA is enabled and incorrect items exist.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented completion contract: feedback-backed completion now requires persisted usable RCA when incorrect items exist; otherwise evaluation status is set FAILED with explicit errorMessage. In accuracy-with-feedback path, status is held RUNNING until RCA contract check completes.
